name: Inventory & Supplies
description: Restaurant inventory and purchasing workspace. Tracks ingredients, par levels, usage, and purchase orders across suppliers.

page_briefs.inventory: Data table listing all ingredients with on-hand quantity, unit of measure, par level, reorder point, last count date, and supplier. Usage-meter bars visually indicate which items are below par, at par, or overstocked.
page_briefs.ingredient-detail: Detail header with ingredient name, category, current stock, supplier, unit cost, and supplier contact. Chart grid below shows 30-day usage trend, cost history, waste percentage, and forecast for next week.
page_briefs.orders: Kanban board with columns for draft, submitted, confirmed, shipped, and received purchase orders. Below, sortable data table listing all POs with supplier, total, expected delivery, and line-item count.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for inventory operations
